rulings.Case Title: PATRICIA HEWLETT VS. J.P. MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Declare Plaintiff A Vexatious Litigant, For Order To Furnish Security And For Pre-Filing Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 11, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANTs J.P. MORGAN CHASE BANK and CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY's Motion To Declare Plaintiff A Vexatious Litigant, For Order To Furnish Security And For Pre-Filing Order GRANTED. Moving party demonstrated that Plaintiff is a vexatious litigant within the meaning of CCP 391 and that a bond shall be required under CCP 391.1. Plaintiff shall post a $50,000 bond within 30 days of notice of entry of order. Prevailing party prepare order.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PATRICIA HEWLETT VS. J.P. MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 11, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANT SHELTER CREEK CONDOMINIUM OWNERS ASSOCIATION DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts in support of each element of each asserted cause of action, not barred by res judicata and/or collateral estoppel. Plaintiff shall have 40 days to file an amended complaint.= (501/REQ)
